narrative:
Precinct Byesville A (precinct in Guernsey County) has 580 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
